qc_silenced.label: Metric 'hvg_overlap' %missing
qc_silenced.reason: v2.0.0 bundles the embed, graph and feature sub-tasks. hvg_overlap only applies to feature-output methods, so it is missing for embed and graph methods by design.

presets.name: graph
presets.label: Graph
presets.description: Graph-based metrics (graph connectivity, ARI, NMI, kBET, iLISI, cLISI, isolated label F1). These are applicable to all batch integration methods, regardless of whether they output a graph, an embedding or corrected features.

presets.name: embed
presets.label: Embedding
presets.description: Embedding-based metrics (ASW batch, ASW label, isolated label ASW, cell cycle conservation, PCR). Applicable only to methods that output an embedding or corrected features; graph-only methods are hidden.

presets.name: feature
presets.label: Feature
presets.description: Feature-based metrics (HVG overlap). Applicable only to methods that output a corrected feature matrix; embedding-only and graph-only methods are hidden.

presets.name: all
presets.label: All results
presets.description: Every method and metric in this release. Some metrics do not apply to every method output type, so cells are empty where a metric could not be computed.
